lockedPromptTemplate: crude MS Paint drawing of spurdo spärde, a brown lumpy asymmetric bear head with two humps and a V-crease between them at the top of the head (NOT separate ears), 3-4 wavy horizontal forehead wrinkle lines, plain black oval eyes with no white highlights, walrus-mustache muzzle made of two cream/tan tilted ellipses (one on each side), black oval nose centered between the muzzle lobes, pink open grinning mouth showing white zipper teeth below the nose, bold uneven black outline, flat fill no shading no gradients, deliberately wobbly hand-drawn lines like an MS Paint sketch from 2008, pasted onto [SCENE] without lighting match or drop shadow as if cut and pasted in. The bear looks crude, charming, dumb, grinning. NOT polished, NOT vector, NOT 3D, NOT anime, NOT photorealistic, NOT cleaned up. NO text, NO logos, NO uniforms, NO weapons.
